short.en: ESP32 / ESP32-S3 firmware: rotary UI, coin detection, OLED debug, persistent state.
short.sl: ESP32 / ESP32-S3 firmware: rotacijski UI, zaznava kovancev, OLED razhroščevanje, trajno stanje.

description.en: The firmware behind FamFive, written twice — once in MicroPython and once in Arduino IDE C++ — to compare developer experience and runtime stability. Rotary encoder UI, SH1106 I2C OLED for live debug, and a coin-detection state machine that handles bounces.
description.sl: Firmware, ki poganja FamFive, napisan dvakrat — enkrat v MicroPythonu in enkrat v Arduino IDE C++ — za primerjavo razvijalskega občutka in stabilnosti. Rotacijski UI, SH1106 I2C OLED za razhroščevanje v živo in stanje stroja za zaznavo kovancev, ki obvlada odboje.
